question: Show all city codes and the total distance to all other cities.
sql: SELECT city1_code, SUM(distance) AS total_distance FROM Direct_distance GROUP BY city1_code;

back_translation.intent: 计算每个城市代码的总距离

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求显示所有城市代码及其到其他城市的总距离，SQL描述通过SUM(distance)按city1_code分组实现了该意图。表结构和字段选择与问题需求一致，未涉及额外过滤或排序要求。
